title: 一次 execute_model 的真实数据流——昇腾 forward context 注入 + DP 跨卡同步
code_spine: vllm_ascend/worker/model_runner_v1.py:L1904-L2335  NPUModelRunner.execute_model 主干（routed-experts capturer / profiling timing / async+PCP/MM deepcopy 分支 → _prepare_inputs → _determine_batch_execution_and_padding(内含 DP 同步) → _build_attention_metadata → _preprocess → set_ascend_forward_context 包住前向 → _model_forward → 存 ExecuteModelState）
vllm_ascend/worker/model_runner_v1.py:L748-L1352  _prepare_inputs（attn 元数据前的输入整形：positions/token_indices/input_ids gather + logits_indices + spec_decode_metadata）
vllm_ascend/worker/model_runner_v1.py:L627-L675  _sync_metadata_across_dp（昇腾把 num_tokens + cudagraph_mode 打包进一次 all_reduce，可走 NPU device group）
vllm_ascend/ascend_forward_context.py:L56-L191  set_ascend_forward_context（关键接缝：with set_forward_context(...) 包住基座，再注入昇腾专属上下文）

vllm_ascend/worker/model_runner_v1.py:L2756-L2792  _model_forward（跑 self.model + flashcomm_v1 的 all_gather 回收）
vllm/forward_context.py:L251-L320  基座 set_forward_context（被昇腾包住：建 DPMetadata + 调 current_platform.set_additional_forward_context）

embed_excerpts.what: execute_model 的核心接缝：用 set_ascend_forward_context 包住一次前向，再调 _model_forward
embed_excerpts.code:
# Run forward pass
        clear_kv_metadata = self.speculative_config is None
        with (
            record_function_or_nullcontext("forward"),
            set_ascend_forward_context(
                attn_metadata,
                self.vllm_config,
                num_tokens=num_tokens_padded,
                num_tokens_across_dp=num_tokens_across_dp,

                skip_compiled=has_encoder_input,
                has_sinks=self._has_sinks,
                input_ids=input_ids,
            ),
            self.maybe_get_kv_connector_output(
                scheduler_output,
                **(
                    {"defer_finalize": not clear_kv_metadata}
                ),
            ) as kv_connector_output,
        ):

                mamba_utils.do_mamba_copy_block(preprocess_bufs)
            hidden_states = self._model_forward(
                num_tokens_padded, input_ids, positions, intermediate_tensors, inputs_embeds, **model_kwargs
            )

embed_excerpts.what: execute_model 主干串联：_prepare_inputs → _determine_batch_execution_and_padding（后者内部做 DP 同步）

(
                    logits_indices,
                    spec_decode_metadata,
                    total_num_scheduled_tokens,
                    num_scheduled_tokens_compressed_list,
                ) = self._prepare_inputs(
                    scheduler_output,
                    num_scheduled_tokens_np,
                )

                num_tokens_unpadded = scheduler_output.total_num_scheduled_tokens
                if self.pcp_size > 1:
                    num_tokens_unpadded = self.pcp_manager.total_num_sampled_tokens_pcp
                cascade_attn_prefix_lens = None
                # Disable cascade attention when using microbatching (DBO)
                if self.cascade_attn_enabled and not self.parallel_config.enable_dbo:
                    # Pre-compute cascade attention prefix lengths
                    cascade_attn_prefix_lens = self._compute_cascade_attn_prefix_lens(
                        num_scheduled_tokens_np,
                        self.input_batch.num_computed_tokens_cpu[:num_reqs],
                        scheduler_output.num_common_prefix_blocks,
                    )

                (
                    cudagraph_mode,
                    batch_desc,
                    should_ubatch,
                    num_tokens_across_dp,
                    cudagraph_stats,
                ) = self._determine_batch_execution_and_padding(
                    num_tokens=num_tokens_unpadded,
                    num_reqs=num_reqs,
                    num_scheduled_tokens_np=num_scheduled_tokens_np,
                    max_num_scheduled_tokens=max_num_scheduled_tokens,
                    use_cascade_attn=cascade_attn_prefix_lens is not None,
                    force_eager=self.model_config.enforce_eager,
                    num_encoder_reqs=len(scheduler_output.scheduled_encoder_inputs),
                )

embed_excerpts.what: 本章重点：set_ascend_forward_context——先 with set_forward_context(基座) 建好上下文，再往 forward_context 上额外注入昇腾专属字段（moe_comm_type/method、flashcomm v1/v2、mmrs_fusion、pad_size、layer_idx、mc2_mask、max_tokens_across_dp/pcp 等）
embed_excerpts.code:
@contextmanager
def set_ascend_forward_context(
    attn_metadata: Any,
    vllm_config: VllmConfig,
    num_tokens: int = 0,
    num_tokens_across_dp: torch.Tensor | None = None,
    in_profile_run: bool = False,
    num_actual_tokens: int | None = None,
    aclgraph_runtime_mode: CUDAGraphMode = CUDAGraphMode.NONE,
    batch_descriptor: BatchDescriptor | None = None,
    model_instance: torch.nn.Module = None,
    is_draft_model=False,
    skip_compiled: bool = False,
    max_tokens_across_pcp: int = 0,
    draft_attn_metadatas=None,
    has_sinks=False,
    input_ids=None,
):
    """A context manager that stores the current forward context,
    can be attention metadata, etc.
    We add some additional param into forward_context.
    """
    forward_context_kwargs = {
        "attn_metadata": attn_metadata,
        "vllm_config": vllm_config,
        "num_tokens": num_tokens,
        "num_tokens_across_dp": num_tokens_across_dp,
        "cudagraph_runtime_mode": aclgraph_runtime_mode,
        "batch_descriptor": batch_descriptor,
        "skip_compiled": skip_compiled,
    }
    with set_forward_context(**forward_context_kwargs):
        forward_context = get_forward_context()
        forward_context.draft_attn_metadatas = draft_attn_metadatas

        forward_context.input_ids = input_ids

        from vllm_ascend.ops.fused_moe.moe_comm_method import get_moe_comm_method

        max_num_tokens = int(num_tokens_across_dp.max().item()) if num_tokens_across_dp is not None else num_tokens
        moe_comm_type = select_moe_comm_method(max_num_tokens, vllm_config, is_draft_model)

        forward_context.moe_comm_type = moe_comm_type
        forward_context.moe_comm_method = get_moe_comm_method(moe_comm_type)

        tp_world_size = get_tensor_model_parallel_world_size()

        forward_context.in_profile_run = in_profile_run

        # NOTE: This cannot be set using set_forward_context
        # due to multiple warmups before actual capturing
        forward_context.capturing = False

        # TODO: remove it when fia merge in fiav2
        forward_context.sinks = has_sinks

        # TODO: remove it when torch_npu.npu_mm_reduce_scatter_base supports tp_size >= 16.
        mmrs_fusion = tp_world_size <= 8

        # main model and drafter model may have different architecture
        is_context_moe_model = is_drafter_moe_model(vllm_config) if is_draft_model else is_moe_model(vllm_config)
        if is_context_moe_model:
            flash_comm_v1_enabled = enable_sp(vllm_config) and num_tokens is not None
            mmrs_fusion = False
        elif is_draft_model:
            flash_comm_v1_enabled = False
        else:
            flash_comm_v1_enabled = enable_sp(vllm_config) and num_tokens is not None and num_tokens > 1000
        forward_context.mmrs_fusion = mmrs_fusion
        forward_context.num_tokens = num_tokens
        forward_context.flash_comm_v1_enabled = flash_comm_v1_enabled
        forward_context.flashcomm_v2_enabled = flashcomm2_enable() and tp_world_size > 1 and num_tokens is not None

        forward_context.pad_size = 0
        if forward_context.flash_comm_v1_enabled or forward_context.flashcomm_v2_enabled:
            pad_size = (tp_world_size - (num_tokens % tp_world_size)) % tp_world_size
            forward_context.pad_size = pad_size

        # set this for rope forward_oot using
        forward_context.is_first_layer = True

        forward_context.layer_idx = None
        if has_layer_idx(model_instance):
            forward_context.layer_idx = model_instance.model.start_layer

        forward_context.prefetch_mlp_gate_up_proj = False
        forward_context.prefetch_mlp_down_proj = False
        forward_context.model_instance = model_instance
        forward_context.is_draft_model = is_draft_model
        forward_context.is_draft_model_prefill = False

        if num_tokens is None and attn_metadata is not None:
            num_tokens = attn_metadata.num_actual_tokens

        dp_world_size = get_dp_group().world_size
        if dp_world_size > 1 and forward_context.dp_metadata is not None:
            dp_meta = forward_context.dp_metadata
            max_tokens_across_dp = dp_meta.num_tokens_across_dp_cpu.max().item()
            if forward_context.flash_comm_v1_enabled or forward_context.flashcomm_v2_enabled:
                padded_length = (max_tokens_across_dp + tp_world_size - 1) // tp_world_size * tp_world_size
                pad_size = padded_length - num_tokens
                forward_context.padded_length = padded_length
                forward_context.pad_size = pad_size
        else:
            max_tokens_across_dp = num_tokens

        forward_context.max_tokens_across_dp = max_tokens_across_dp
        forward_context.max_tokens_across_pcp = max_tokens_across_pcp

        if num_tokens is not None:
            if num_actual_tokens is None:
                num_actual_tokens = num_tokens
            # NOTE: token num which need to pad to when mc2
            forward_context.padded_num_tokens = math.ceil(max_tokens_across_dp / tp_world_size) * tp_world_size
            reserved_mc2_mask = get_mc2_mask()
            if reserved_mc2_mask is not None:
                mc2_mask = reserved_mc2_mask[: forward_context.padded_num_tokens]
                mc2_mask[:num_actual_tokens] = True
                mc2_mask[num_actual_tokens:] = False
                forward_context.mc2_mask = mc2_mask
        try:
            yield
        finally:
            pass
elide: 原文中关于 flashcomm_v1 1000 阈值的大段经验值注释（L115-120）已删去仅留结论；TODO 注释（normalize sp/fc2、fia 合并）保留少量以示真实演进。正文逐字内嵌时应保留 with set_forward_context(**forward_context_kwargs) 这一层包裹关系——这是『包基座再注入』的核心证据

embed_excerpts.what: select_moe_comm_method：在 forward context 注入前算出本拍 MoE 通信方式（按 是否 MoE / 是否 EP / soc 版本 A2/A3/_310P/A5 / token 数 vs mc2_tokens_capacity / 量化类型）
elide: docstring 里 6 条规则的逐条英文说明（L237-258）正文可改写为中文要点；TODO 行（drop EP-size guard 等）可略。AscendDeviceType: A2=0/A3=1/_310P=2/A5=3

embed_excerpts.what: DP 跨卡同步：昇腾自有 _sync_metadata_across_dp——把 num_tokens 与 cudagraph_mode 打包成一个 [2, dp_size] 张量做一次 all_reduce，可经 NPU device group 规避 CPU all_reduce 脏数据；解包后取 max token 数 + 取 min 的 cudagraph_mode
embed_excerpts.code:
def _sync_metadata_across_dp(
        self,
        num_tokens: int,
        is_draft_model: bool = False,
        cudagraph_mode: CUDAGraphMode = CUDAGraphMode.NONE,
        allow_dp_padding: bool = False,
    ) -> tuple[int, torch.Tensor | None, CUDAGraphMode]:
        # TODO: In vLLM, the only thing that needs to be synced is num_tokens, but in
        # our case, we still need to sync the other two flags as well. So we need to
        # include them in the all_reduce operation, and more over, we CANNOT skip it
        # even if we are running in eager mode, which harms performance.
        if self.dp_size == 1:
            return num_tokens, None, cudagraph_mode

        if should_skip_allreduce_across_dp_group(self.vllm_config, is_draft_model):
            num_tokens_after_padding = torch.tensor([num_tokens] * self.dp_size, device="cpu", dtype=torch.int32)
            return num_tokens, num_tokens_after_padding, cudagraph_mode

        # On certain devices, CPU-side all_reduce may return dirty data.
        # When dp_allreduce_on_npu is True, route DP metadata
        # synchronization through the NPU device group to avoid data corruption.
        device_str, group = (
            ("npu", get_dp_group().device_group)
            if self.ascend_config.dp_allreduce_on_npu
            else ("cpu", get_dp_group().cpu_group)
        )
        packed_tensor = torch.zeros(2, self.dp_size, device=device_str, dtype=torch.int32)
        packed_tensor[0][self.dp_rank] = num_tokens
        packed_tensor[1][self.dp_rank] = cudagraph_mode.value
        dist.all_reduce(packed_tensor, group=group)
        if device_str == "npu":
            packed_tensor = packed_tensor.cpu()

        # Unpack the results
        num_tokens_across_dp = packed_tensor[0, :]
        max_tokens_across_dp = int(num_tokens_across_dp.max().item())
        synced_cudagraph_mode = CUDAGraphMode(_post_process_cudagraph_mode(packed_tensor))

        # Create a tensor for num_tokens_after_padding
        if allow_dp_padding or is_draft_model:
            num_tokens_after_padding = torch.tensor(
                [max_tokens_across_dp] * self.dp_size, device="cpu", dtype=torch.int32
            )
        else:
            num_tokens_after_padding = num_tokens_across_dp.cpu()

        return max_tokens_across_dp, num_tokens_after_padding, synced_cudagraph_mode
elide: 开头 FIXME（enforce_eager 恢复条件）注释略减。注意 packed_tensor 是 0 张量 + 仅本 rank 写自己那列 → all_reduce(sum) 等价于把每卡各自的值汇齐到所有卡，这是『各卡只填自己、求和即广播』的惯用法

embed_excerpts.what: _determine_batch_execution_and_padding 里调用 DP 同步的上下文：dp_size>1 时同步 → 用同步回来的 num_tokens_across_dp 取本卡 padding → 用同步回来的 cudagraph_mode 重新 dispatch（保证全 DP 一致进图）
embed_excerpts.code:
# Extra coordination when running data-parallel since we need to coordinate
        # across ranks
        should_ubatch, num_tokens_across_dp = False, None
        if self.vllm_config.parallel_config.data_parallel_size > 1:
            _, num_tokens_across_dp, synced_cudagraph_mode = self._sync_metadata_across_dp(
                num_tokens=num_tokens_padded,
                cudagraph_mode=cudagraph_mode,
                allow_dp_padding=(cudagraph_mode != CUDAGraphMode.NONE) or enable_sp(self.vllm_config),
            )

            # Extract DP padding if there is any
            if num_tokens_across_dp is not None:
                dp_rank = self.parallel_config.data_parallel_rank
                num_tokens_padded = int(num_tokens_across_dp[dp_rank].item())
                # Re-dispatch with DP padding
                cudagraph_mode, batch_descriptor = dispatch_cudagraph(
                    num_tokens_padded,
                    valid_modes={synced_cudagraph_mode},
                )
                # Assert to make sure the agreed upon token count is correct otherwise
                # num_tokens_across_dp will no-longer be valid
                assert batch_descriptor.num_tokens == num_tokens_padded
elide: 前半段 _pad_for_sequence_parallelism / uniform_decode 判定 / dispatch_cudagraph 闭包定义（L2862-2901）正文一句话带过

embed_excerpts.what: 被昇腾包住的基座：set_forward_context 建 DPMetadata（dp_size>1 且 moe 时，必要则 coordinate_batch_across_dp 求 num_tokens_across_dp），并经 current_platform.set_additional_forward_context 让平台注入 additional_kwargs——这正是昇腾挂钩的入口
embed_excerpts.code:
dp_metadata: DPMetadata | None = None
    if (
        vllm_config.parallel_config.data_parallel_size > 1
        and vllm_config.parallel_config.is_moe_model is not False
        and (attn_metadata is not None or num_tokens is not None)
    ):
        if num_tokens_across_dp is None:
            assert ubatch_slices is None
            assert num_tokens is not None
            _, num_tokens_across_dp, _ = coordinate_batch_across_dp(
                num_tokens_unpadded=num_tokens,
                parallel_config=vllm_config.parallel_config,
                allow_microbatching=False,
            )
            assert num_tokens_across_dp is not None
        dp_metadata = DPMetadata.make(
            vllm_config.parallel_config, num_tokens or 0, num_tokens_across_dp
        )

    if cudagraph_runtime_mode != CUDAGraphMode.NONE and num_tokens is not None:
        batch_descriptor = batch_descriptor or BatchDescriptor(num_tokens=num_tokens)

    additional_kwargs = current_platform.set_additional_forward_context(
        attn_metadata=attn_metadata,
        vllm_config=vllm_config,
        dp_metadata=dp_metadata,
        num_tokens=num_tokens,
        num_tokens_across_dp=num_tokens_across_dp,
        cudagraph_runtime_mode=cudagraph_runtime_mode,
        batch_descriptor=batch_descriptor,
        ubatch_slices=ubatch_slices,
    )
elide: track_batchsize 计时（L266-269）、create_forward_context + override_forward_context 收尾（L310-330）、batchsize 统计日志 finally 块（L332-362）正文可略；关键是『昇腾不再走 set_forward_context 里的 num_tokens_across_dp 自动 all_reduce，而是自己在 _sync_metadata_across_dp 先算好、再以 num_tokens_across_dp 传入』

embed_excerpts.what: _model_forward：在已注入的 forward context 下真正跑 self.model；FULL graph 需要时更新参数；flash_comm_v1 开启时对 hidden_states 做 all_gather 回收（SP 切分的逆操作）
embed_excerpts.code:
def _model_forward(
        self,
        num_tokens_padded: int,
        input_ids: torch.Tensor | None = None,
        positions: torch.Tensor | None = None,
        intermediate_tensors: IntermediateTensors | None = None,
        inputs_embeds: torch.Tensor | None = None,
        **model_kwargs: dict[str, Any],
    ):
        assert self.model is not None
        forward_context = get_forward_context()
        assert forward_context is not None

        model_inputs: dict[str, Any] = {
            "input_ids": input_ids,
            "positions": positions,
            "intermediate_tensors": intermediate_tensors,
            "inputs_embeds": inputs_embeds,
            **model_kwargs,
        }
        run_model = partial(self.model, **model_inputs)

        if self.enable_enpu:
            # The soft segmentation scenario requires event.record first, then event.wait
            self._update_full_graph_params_if_needed(
                forward_context, num_tokens_padded, positions
            )
            hidden_states = run_model()
        else:
            hidden_states = run_model()
            self._update_full_graph_params_if_needed(
                forward_context, num_tokens_padded, positions
            )

        if forward_context.flash_comm_v1_enabled and not isinstance(hidden_states, IntermediateTensors):
            hidden_states = self._all_gather_hidden_states_and_aux(hidden_states)
        return hidden_states

embed_excerpts.what: _sample：昇腾重写以支持 lmhead_tp / reduce_sample；无 spec → self.sampler；有 spec → self.rejection_sampler。采样器内部留后续章节
elide: _sample 在 sample_tokens() 里被调用（execute_model 已 split 为 execute_model + sample_tokens 两段，L2337-L2390）。正文主线讲到 logits→_sample 即可，sample_tokens 的 grammar bitmask / bookkeeping 属横切

embed_excerpts.what: _prepare_inputs 尾部：算 logits_indices（无 spec：每请求最后一个 token 位 query_start_loc-1；有 spec：来自 _calc_spec_decode_metadata）与 spec_decode_metadata
elide: _prepare_inputs 主体（L760-1272）：commit_block_table、req_indices=np.repeat、positions_np = num_computed_tokens + query_pos、token_indices = positions + req*max_len、torch.index_select 取 input_ids、mrope/PCP/use_compress 分支。正文讲『输入整形』概念即可，无需逐行；重点是产出 input_ids/positions/logits_indices 三件套喂给后续 attn 元数据与前向

key_classes.name: NPUModelRunner
key_classes.responsibility: 昇腾版 GPUModelRunner 子类。持有 execute_model 主干、_prepare_inputs/_build_attention_metadata/_model_forward/_sample，以及昇腾自有的 _sync_metadata_across_dp / _determine_batch_execution_and_padding。本章的『一拍前向』全在此类内编排

key_classes.name: set_ascend_forward_context
key_classes.responsibility: contextmanager。本章关键接缝：with set_forward_context(基座) 包住后，往同一个 forward_context 对象上注入昇腾专属字段（moe_comm_type/method、flashcomm v1/v2、mmrs_fusion、pad_size、padded_num_tokens、mc2_mask、layer_idx、max_tokens_across_dp/pcp 等），供模型各层 forward 时按本拍形状/并行模式取用

key_classes.name: select_moe_comm_method
key_classes.responsibility: 纯函数。按 is_moe_model / 是否 EP / soc 版本(A2/A3/_310P/A5) / num_tokens vs mc2_tokens_capacity / 量化类型，决定本拍 MoE 通信方式 MoECommType(ALLGATHER/MC2/ALLTOALL/FUSED_MC2) 或 None

key_classes.name: MoECommType
key_classes.responsibility: Enum：ALLGATHER=0/MC2=1/ALLTOALL=2/FUSED_MC2=3。forward_context.moe_comm_type 之取值，下游 get_moe_comm_method 据此取 MoECommMethod 实例

key_classes.name: set_forward_context
key_classes.responsibility: 基座 contextmanager（被昇腾包住）。建 ForwardContext（attn_metadata/dp_metadata/cudagraph_runtime_mode/batch_descriptor），dp_size>1 且 moe 时建 DPMetadata，并经 current_platform.set_additional_forward_context 让平台注入 additional_kwargs

key_classes.name: _ExtraForwardContextProxy / _EXTRA_CTX
key_classes.responsibility: 对 forward_context 上昇腾专属额外字段的统一读写代理：V2 model runner 走 ctx.additional_kwargs，否则直接 getattr/setattr。下游算子用 `from ... import _EXTRA_CTX` 读 moe_comm_method/mc2_mask 等

key_classes.name: _post_process_cudagraph_mode
key_classes.responsibility: DP 同步后取 packed_tensor[1,:].min() 作为全 DP 一致的 cudagraph_mode——任一卡为 NONE 则全卡 NONE，保证各卡『一起进图或一起不进图』

key_classes.name: should_skip_allreduce_across_dp_group
key_classes.responsibility: 决定能否跳过 DP all_reduce：dense 模型直接跳；MoE 仅在 KV consumer 且 prefill/decode 都走 MC2(或满足 recompute 条件) 时跳。跳过意味各卡 token 数可不同，MC2 需非零 global_bs 且不收 mc2_mask

data_flow: 1. execute_model(scheduler_output): routed_experts capturer finalize/clear（若启用）；profiling need_timing 记起始时刻；async+spec 或 PCP+MM 时 deepcopy/replace scheduler_output 防污染 engine-core 进程
2. _update_states(scheduler_output) 更新持久 batch；num_scheduled_tokens==0 时按 DP/外部 launcher 走 dummy_run 或早返回

3. _prepare_inputs(scheduler_output, num_scheduled_tokens_np) → 整形输入：positions_np = num_computed_tokens + query_pos；token_indices → torch.index_select 取 input_ids；产出 (logits_indices, spec_decode_metadata, total_num_scheduled_tokens, compressed_list)

4. _determine_batch_execution_and_padding(...): 先按 SP pad、dispatch cudagraph 得 (cudagraph_mode, batch_desc)；dp_size>1 → _sync_metadata_across_dp 打包 num_tokens+cudagraph_mode 一次 all_reduce → 取回 num_tokens_across_dp 与 synced_cudagraph_mode → 以本卡 padding 重新 dispatch（valid_modes={synced_cudagraph_mode}）
5. _build_attention_metadata(...): 建注意力元数据（block_table/slot_mapping/seq_lens），后端实体(AscendAttentionBackend/MLA)留 ch18，本章只到『建好交给前向』

7. with set_ascend_forward_context(attn_metadata, vllm_config, num_tokens=num_tokens_padded, num_tokens_across_dp=..., aclgraph_runtime_mode=cudagraph_mode, ...): → 内部 with set_forward_context(基座) 建 ForwardContext+DPMetadata → 再注入昇腾字段：select_moe_comm_method 选 moe_comm_type、get_moe_comm_method 取 method、算 flashcomm v1/v2、mmrs_fusion、pad_size、padded_num_tokens、mc2_mask、layer_idx、max_tokens_across_dp/pcp
8. _model_forward(...): 在该上下文里跑 self.model；FULL graph 需要时 _update_full_graph_params_if_needed；flash_comm_v1 时对 hidden_states all_gather 回收
9. 后处理：PCP restore、PP 非末 rank 返回 IntermediateTensors、pooling 模型返回；否则 sample_hidden_states = hidden_states[logits_indices] → compute_logits → 存 ExecuteModelState（execute_model 返回 None）

10. sample_tokens(grammar_output): 取出 ExecuteModelState → （可选 grammar bitmask）→ _sample(logits, spec_decode_metadata) → sampler/rejection_sampler → _bookkeeping_sync → 组 ModelRunnerOutput（含 routed_experts/profiling time）

design_decisions.decision: 昇腾不直接用 vLLM 的 set_forward_context，而是包一层 set_ascend_forward_context
design_decisions.why: 基座 forward_context 只携带通用字段（attn_metadata/dp_metadata/cudagraph_mode/batch_descriptor）。昇腾的 MoE 通信原语（MC2/all_to_all/all_gather）、flashcomm SP、mc2_mask 等需要『按本拍 token 形状 + 并行模式动态选定』的额外上下文，这些 vLLM 上游不认识。包一层后在 with 体内往同一个 forward_context 上挂这些字段，模型各层 forward 时就地取用，无需改 vLLM 源码

design_decisions.decision: 每拍前向之前就算好 moe_comm_type（而非层内现算）
design_decisions.why: 通信方式取决于本拍 token 数（vs mc2_tokens_capacity）、EP/DP 规模、soc 版本，全 batch 内一致；前置算一次写进 forward_context，所有 MoE 层共用，避免逐层重复决策且保证一致性

design_decisions.decision: DP 同步从基座的『只同步 num_tokens』升级为『num_tokens + cudagraph_mode 打包一次 all_reduce』
design_decisions.why: DP 各卡必须就 (a)统一 padding 后的 token 数 (b)是否进 ACL graph 及哪种 graph 模式 达成一致，才能一起进同一张图、避免 launch 不同步/集合通信错位。cudagraph_mode 取各卡 min（任一 NONE 则全 NONE），token 数取 max 后据 allow_dp_padding 决定是否全卡对齐

design_decisions.decision: DP all_reduce 可走 NPU device group（dp_allreduce_on_npu）而非 CPU group
design_decisions.why: 源码注释：某些设备上 CPU 侧 all_reduce 可能返回脏数据，走 NPU device group 规避数据损坏；代价是多一次 device→cpu 拷贝

design_decisions.decision: packed_tensor 各卡只写自己那一列、其余为 0，再 all_reduce(sum)
design_decisions.why: 零初始化 + 仅本 rank 填自己 num_tokens/cudagraph_mode + sum-allreduce，等价于把每卡的值汇齐广播到所有卡（无需 all_gather），一次集合通信完成双量同步

design_decisions.decision: 即使 eager 模式也不能跳过 DP 同步
design_decisions.why: 源码注释明示：因为还要同步 cudagraph_mode 等额外标志，所以即便 eager 也 CANNOT skip，确实牺牲了一点性能（FIXME 待这些标志不再需要时恢复跳过）

design_decisions.decision: flashcomm_v1(SP) 的开启带 num_tokens>1000 经验阈值（非 MoE 模型）
design_decisions.why: 并发高于阈值时切换通信方式收益最大化，低于阈值切换反而劣化（经验值）。MoE 模型不设阈值、drafter dense 直接关

design_decisions.decision: mc2_mask 从预留缓冲 _reserved_mc2_mask 切片复用，按 padded_num_tokens 标 True/False
design_decisions.why: MC2 需要标记哪些是真实 token、哪些是 padding；预分配一次（set_mc2_mask）后每拍切片复用避免反复分配

theory.detail: Data Parallel 下各卡跑不同请求子集，但 MoE 的 all_to_all/MC2 等集合通信要求所有参与卡在同一时刻以一致的形状/模式发起。若各卡 token 数或 graph 模式不一致，集合通信会错位甚至挂死。故进图前必须 all_reduce 取齐 num_tokens（取 max 做 padding）与 cudagraph_mode（取 min 保守对齐）
padded_num_tokens = ceil(max_tokens_across_dp / tp_world_size) * tp_world_size：把（跨 DP 取 max 的）token 数向上对齐到 tp_world_size 的整数倍，使 TP/SP 切分均匀，MC2/all_gather 等通信缓冲规整
[2, dp_size] 全零张量，rank i 只写第 i 列 → all_reduce(SUM) 后每卡都得到完整的 [各卡 num_tokens; 各卡 cudagraph_mode]。这是『各填己列、求和即聚合』的标准技巧，省去 all_gather

delete.what: execute_model 内 ngram_gpu 的 scheduler_output.replace 分支（L1933-1945）
delete.why_safe: 投机解码 ngram 专属优化，不影响主干前向数据流；精简版聚焦 deepcopy/replace 之外的主路径

delete.what: execute_model 内 has_ec_transfer/EC connector 早返回、kv_sharing_fast_prefill assert（L1993-2023）
delete.why_safe: encoder-cache 传输与特性断言为横切，删后主干 num_scheduled_tokens>0 路径仍完整
Mamba/稀疏注意力专属预处理，非本章 MoE/forward-context 主线，删后 dense/MoE 标准前向不受影响

delete.what: PCP/use_cp 相关全部分支（_prepare_inputs 与 _build_attention_metadata 内 pcp_manager.*、set_ascend_forward_context 的 max_tokens_across_pcp 仅保留赋值）
delete.why_safe: Parallel Context Processing 为可选特性；本章主干以 pcp_size==1 直路讲解，精简版保留 pcp_size==1 分支即可，PCP 分支整段属可省略说明

delete.what: _build_attention_metadata 中 EncoderOnlyAttentionSpec/多 kv_cache_group/cascade/spec 的细节（L2987-L3083 之后）
delete.why_safe: 注意力后端实体留 ch18；本章只需『建好 attn_metadata 交给前向』这一接口语义，内部 backend 细节删去不破坏主干叙事

delete.what: set_forward_context 基座的 track_batchsize 计时与 batchsize 统计日志 finally 块（vllm/forward_context.py:L266-269,L332-362）
delete.why_safe: 性能日志统计，与上下文注入语义无关

must_keep.why: 本章主干入口，必须保留派发骨架
本章关键接缝，包基座再注入，必须逐字呈现 with set_forward_context(**forward_context_kwargs) 这层包裹
被包住的基座；精简版需体现『昇腾在它之上注入』的关系（import 自 vllm.forward_context）
forward context 注入前选定通信方式的决策核心，writer 要讲清 soc/EP/token 数三因素
通信方式枚举（ALLGATHER/MC2/ALLTOALL/FUSED_MC2），select 的返回类型
注入到 forward_context 的核心字段名，下游算子据此取通信方法
get_moe_comm_method(moe_comm_type) 的结果，挂到 forward_context
由 type 取 MoECommMethod 实例的工厂
昇腾 SP(flashcomm v1) 开关字段，_model_forward 据此 all_gather 回收 hidden_states
flashcomm v2 开关字段，与 pad_size 计算相关
mm_reduce_scatter 融合开关（tp<=8 且非 MoE），注入字段
MC2 真实/padding token 掩码，按 padded_num_tokens 切片注入
ceil 对齐到 tp 整数倍的 token 数，mc2/通信缓冲依赖
DP 跨卡同步核心方法，本章 DP 主题必保留
DP 同步取 min 的 cudagraph_mode 后处理，体现『任一 NONE 则全 NONE』
决定是否跳过 DP all_reduce 的条件，writer 需讲清 dense 直跳 / MoE 条件跳
DP 同步产物，贯穿 padding 与 forward context
调用 DP 同步并据结果重新 dispatch cudagraph 的编排方法
attn 元数据前的输入整形，主干一步
建注意力元数据，主干一步（内部 backend 留 ch18）
真正跑模型的一步，含 flash_comm_v1 回收
采样派发（sampler/rejection_sampler），主干末步
DP all_reduce 走 NPU device group 的开关，体现规避 CPU 脏数据的设计

diagram_plan.name: ch15-roadmap
diagram_plan.spec: 复用 book/assets/roadmap/roadmap.py 出『你在这里』：高亮节点=execute_model 单拍前向（Part IV worker 线）；前承 ch13/ch14（NPUModelRunner 搭台/输入批管理），后接 ch18(注意力后端)、ch26(MoE 通信原语)

diagram_plan.name: ch15-forward-spine
diagram_plan.spec: svg-diagram 横向泳道流水：execute_model → _prepare_inputs(input_ids/positions/logits_indices) → _determine_batch_execution_and_padding(含 _sync_metadata_across_dp 虚线分叉到『DP 各卡 all_reduce』) → _build_attention_metadata → set_ascend_forward_context(双层框：外层基座 set_forward_context，内层昇腾注入字段列) → _model_forward → _sample。标注横切点(ch18/ch26/采样后续)以淡色旁注

diagram_plan.name: ch15-forward-context-injection
diagram_plan.spec: svg-diagram 两层同心/嵌套框：外框=vLLM ForwardContext(attn_metadata/dp_metadata/cudagraph_runtime_mode/batch_descriptor)，内框=昇腾额外注入(moe_comm_type/method、flashcomm_v1/v2、mmrs_fusion、pad_size、padded_num_tokens、mc2_mask、layer_idx、max_tokens_across_dp/pcp)。左侧标 select_moe_comm_method 的三输入(soc/EP·token数·量化)→moe_comm_type

diagram_plan.name: ch15-dp-sync
diagram_plan.spec: svg-diagram：dp_size=2 两卡各持 [num_tokens; cudagraph_mode]，packed_tensor[2,dp] 各填己列→all_reduce(SUM)→两卡同得完整表→num_tokens 取 max(padding)、cudagraph_mode 取 min(保守对齐)→一起进图。旁注 dp_allreduce_on_npu 走 NPU group 规避 CPU 脏数据

foreshadow_due.note: bible.py due ch15 返回空（无应埋/应回收伏笔）。本章自身可被后续回收的接口：moe_comm_type/moe_comm_method(→ch26 MoE 通信原语实现)、attn_metadata(→ch18 AscendAttentionBackend/MLA)、_sample 采样器(→后续采样章)。建议 writer 写后在 Bible 接口注册表登记这三处『此处选定/建好，实现留后章』的伏笔。
